entity.label: Elihu
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the family of Obed-edom, who were appointed porters of the temple under David (1 Chr. 26:7).

nodes.label: Elihu
nodes.description: One of the family of Obed-edom, who were appointed porters of the temple under David (1 Chr. 26:7).

nodes.label: Shemaiah
nodes.description: The eldest son of Obed-edom (1 Chr. 26:4-8).

nodes.label: Othni
nodes.description: A lion of Jehovah, a son of Shemaiah, and one of the temple porters in the time of David (1 Chr. 26:7). He was a “mighty man of valour.”

nodes.label: Rephael
nodes.description: Healed of God, one of Shemaiah’s sons. He and his brethren, on account of their “strength for service,” formed one of the divisions of the temple porters (1 Chr. 26:7, 8).

verses.text: The sons of Shemaiah; Othni, and Rephael, and Obed, Elzabad, whose brethren were strong men, Elihu, and Semachiah.
